name: MillenAI
description: A high-performance AI workspace featuring the 'AI Council'—a multi-agent system for deep, collaborative reasoning.
cardDescription: AI Workspace with Multi Agent Workflows.

sections.title: What is MillenAI?
paragraphs: I was drowning in tabs. ChatGPT in one, a new open-source model in another, Perplexity for research—my workflow was a mess of lost conversations and fragmented context. I built the first version of MillenAI to solve this, creating a unified workspace to seamlessly switch between models without losing momentum. It was a huge improvement, but a new problem emerged.

When I asked a complex question, like "Should our company invest in decentralized AI?", I realized every AI gave me a single, monolithic answer. One model would be optimistic about the tech, another cautious about the ethics, and a third would focus on the market data. Each answer was useful, but incomplete. To get a truly comprehensive view, I had to manually synthesize these different perspectives, a tedious and error-prone process.

That was the moment it all clicked. Why ask one AI to be a jack-of-all-trades when I could assemble a team of specialists? This led to the creation of the AI Council. Instead of just one response, MillenAI now convenes a panel of AIs: a web-savvy Researcher, a pragmatic Analyst, a contrarian Philosopher, and a decisive Judge. You watch them work in real-time as they research, debate, and synthesize their findings into a final, multi-faceted verdict. It's not just a chat; it's a collaborative intelligence system.

items.name: The AI Council
items.description: Convene specialized AI agents (Researcher, Analyst, Philosopher, Judge) to tackle complex problems from multiple angles.

items.name: Advanced Document Processing
items.description: Bring your own data. Process images (OCR), PDFs, DOCX, and more, directly in the chat context.

items.name: Multi-Model Chat
items.description: Seamlessly switch between top open-source models like Llama 3.1 and GPT-OSS in one conversation.

items.name: Agentic Tooling
items.description: Equip any model with universal web search or engage deep reasoning mode for complex analysis.

items.name: Persistent & Private
items.description: Secure Firebase Auth saves your chat history. Your API keys never leave your browser.

items.name: Polished UX
items.description: A meticulously crafted interface with a real-time token counter, rich Markdown, and stunning animations.

items.name: Strategic Thinkers
items.description: Get comprehensive, multi-faceted answers for complex business or research questions.

items.name: Developers & Researchers
items.description: A fast, open-source playground to test and compare advanced model outputs.

items.name: Content Creators
items.description: Go beyond simple drafts with an AI system that provides research, analysis, and diverse perspectives.

items.name: AI Power-Users
items.description: A unified hub to orchestrate and converse with the world's most powerful LLMs.

sections.title: Technology & Architecture
paragraphs: MillenAI is built with a modern, high-performance tech stack. The frontend is powered by React 19+ and Vite, with styling from Tailwind CSS v4 and fluid animations from Framer Motion. Global state for the AI Council is managed efficiently by Zustand.

The backend leverages Firebase Auth for secure Google Sign-In and Firestore for real-time conversation storage. The AI Council's complex workflow is orchestrated by a Vercel Edge Function, which streams status updates to the client while making sequential calls to the ultra-fast Groq API.

sections.title: Get Started
paragraphs: Ready to experience a smarter way to interact with AI? Launch the app to convene your own AI Council or dive into the open-source codebase on GitHub to contribute.
